intended_use: The Maestro System is intended to hold and position laparoscopes and laparoscopic instruments during laparoscopic surgical procedures.
intended_use_full: The Maestro System is intended to hold and position laparoscopes and laparoscopic instruments during laparoscopic surgical procedures.
ground_truth: Independent testing dataset containing videos used to verify ML model performance on known and unseen surgical instrument brands
other_metrics: ML model performance measured using Average Precision (AP) and Average Recall (AR) with 95% confidence intervals; lower bound of 95%CI for AP and AR verified to be compliant with specification on independent testing dataset including unseen instrument brands.
